paths:
  /export/tasks:
    post:
      tags: [ExportTasks]
      summary: Create export task
      description: |
        Creates a PENDING export task when taskCode is registered and enabled.
        clientRequestId is idempotent in scope tenantId + operatorId + taskCode + clientRequestId.
      operationId: createExportTask
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateExportTaskRequest"
            examples:
              purchaseOrder:
                summary: Purchase order export task
                value:
                  taskCode: purchase-order-export
                  subsystemCode: purchase
                  fileFormat: XLSX
                  clientRequestId: req-20260513-0001
                  queryParams:
                    createdAtFrom: "2026-05-01T00:00:00+08:00"
                    createdAtTo: "2026-05-13T23:59:59+08:00"
                    orderStatus: APPROVED
                    supplierId: SUP-001
                    purchaseOrgId: ORG-001
                    keyword: PO-2026
      x-contract-errorResponses:
        - TASK_DISABLED
        - EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
        - QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
        - DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
        - FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
        - MASKING_RULE_ERROR
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Task created.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateExportTaskResponseEnvelope"
              examples:
                created:
                  value:
                    code: SUCCESS
                    message: success
                    data:
                      taskId: exp_20260513_000001
                      taskCode: purchase-order-export
                      subsystemCode: purchase
                      status: PENDING
                      clientRequestId: req-20260513-0001
                      idempotencyHit: false
                      idempotencyScope: tenant-001:u001:purchase-order-export:req-20260513-0001
                      requestDigest: sha256:request-digest
                      configSnapshotDigest: sha256:config-digest
                      attemptNo: 0
                      createdAt: "2026-05-13T10:00:00+08:00"
        "200":
          description: Existing task returned for idempotent replay with identical request digest.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateExportTaskResponseEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/CreateTaskBadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/IdempotencyConflict"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/DatasourceUnavailable"
      x-contract-errorResponseStatus:
        TASK_DISABLED: 400
        QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE: 400
        EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: 400
        DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE: 500
        INTERNAL_ERROR: 500
    get:
      tags: [ExportTasks]
      summary: Search task history
      description: |
        Returns paged task history. Normal users can only see their own tasks;
        administrators can see global tasks according to roleCodes and orgScope.
      operationId: listExportTasks
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - name: taskCode
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskStatus"
        - name: createdBy
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: createdAtFrom
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
        - name: createdAtTo
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date-time
        - name: fileFormat
          in: query
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileFormat"
        - name: subsystemCode
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            default: 1
        - name: pageSize
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            maximum: 100
            default: 20
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paged task history.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskPageEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/QueryExecutionError"
  /export/tasks/{taskId}:
    get:
      tags: [ExportTasks]
      summary: Get task detail and progress
      operationId: getExportTask
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Task detail.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskDetailEnvelope"
              examples:
                executing:
                  value:
                    code: SUCCESS
                    message: success
                    data:
                      taskId: exp_20260513_000001
                      taskCode: purchase-order-export
                      subsystemCode: purchase
                      status: EXECUTING
                      totalCount: 100000
                      processedCount: 20000
                      progressPercent: 20.0
                      fileFormat: ZIP
                      attemptNo: 1
                      requestId: req-20260513-0001
                      requestDigest: sha256:request-digest
                      configSnapshotDigest: sha256:config-digest
                      createdBy: u001
                      createdAt: "2026-05-13T10:00:00+08:00"
                      updatedAt: "2026-05-13T10:05:00+08:00"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotFound"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
  /export/tasks/{taskId}/download:
    get:
      tags: [ExportTasks]
      summary: Download exported file
      description: |
        The default mode returns a signed URL and file metadata. Stream delivery
        is represented by application/octet-stream and equivalent metadata headers.
      operationId: downloadExportTask
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskId"
        - name: mode
          in: query
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeliveryMode"
            default: SIGNED_URL
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Signed URL response or file stream.
          headers:
            X-Export-File-Name:
              schema:
                type: string
            X-Export-File-Size:
              schema:
                type: integer
                format: int64
            X-Export-Checksum:
              schema:
                type: string
            X-Export-Checksum-Algorithm:
              schema:
                type: string
                enum: [SHA-256]
            X-Export-Attempt-No:
              schema:
                type: integer
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/DownloadResponseEnvelope"
              examples:
                signedUrl:
                  value:
                    code: SUCCESS
                    message: success
                    data:
                      deliveryMode: SIGNED_URL
                      downloadUrl: "https://oss.example.com/signed-url"
                      expiresAt: "2026-05-13T10:10:00+08:00"
                      fileName: purchase-order-export-20260513.zip
                      fileSize: 1048576
                      contentType: application/zip
                      checksum: sha256:file-checksum
                      checksumAlgorithm: SHA-256
                      storageKey: exports/purchase/purchase-order-export/20260513/exp_20260513_000001/1/purchase-order-export-20260513.zip
                      attemptNo: 1
            application/octet-stream:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/FileNotReady"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotFound"
        "410":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/FileExpired"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/FileVerifyError"
        "502":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/ExportRenderError"
      x-contract-errorResponses:
        - FILE_NOT_READY
        - FILE_VERIFY_ERROR
        - EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
  /export/tasks/{taskId}/cancel:
    post:
      tags: [ExportTasks]
      summary: Cancel export task
      description: |
        PENDING tasks can be canceled immediately. EXECUTING tasks accept cancel
        intent and still return EXECUTING until the worker closes the task at a
        batch boundary. The API never returns an internal cancel marker as a task status.
      operationId: cancelExportTask
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskId"
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskActionRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Cancel accepted or completed.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskActionResponseEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InvalidTaskState"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotFound"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
  /export/tasks/{taskId}/retry:
    post:
      tags: [ExportTasks]
      summary: Retry failed export task
      description: |
        Only FAILED tasks are retryable. Retry keeps the original taskId,
        reuses the original config snapshot, increments attemptNo and creates no
        second active execution attempt.
      operationId: retryExportTask
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskId"
      requestBody:
        required: false
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskActionRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Retry accepted.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskActionResponseEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InvalidTaskState"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/ActiveAttemptConflict"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotFound"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
  /export/registries:
    post:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Create export registry
      operationId: createExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryUpsertRequest"
            examples:
              purchaseOrderRegistry:
                value:
                  taskCode: purchase-order-export
                  subsystemCode: purchase
                  displayName: Purchase order export
                  enabled: true
                  concurrencyLimit: 3
                  fileRetentionDays: 15
                  taskHistoryRetentionDays: 30
                  singleFileMaxRows: 20000
                  exportMaxRows: 100000
                  supportedFormats: [XLSX, ZIP]
                  datasourceCode: purchase_ro
                  parameterSchema:
                    required: [createdAtFrom, createdAtTo]
                    properties:
                      createdAtFrom:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
                      createdAtTo:
                        type: string
                        format: date-time
                      orderStatus:
                        type: string
                      supplierId:
                        type: string
                      purchaseOrgId:
                        type: string
                      keyword:
                        type: string
                  queryTemplate:
                    queryTemplateVersion: v1
                    templateText: "select ... where created_at between :createdAtFrom and :createdAtTo order by order_id asc"
                    allowedParameters: [createdAtFrom, createdAtTo, orderStatus, supplierId, purchaseOrgId, keyword]
                  fieldMappings:
                    - fieldCode: orderNo
                      headerName: Order No
                      fieldType: STRING
                      orderNo: 1
                      sensitive: false
                      exportable: true
                    - fieldCode: contactPhone
                      headerName: Contact Phone
                      fieldType: STRING
                      orderNo: 10
                      sensitive: true
                      exportable: true
                      maskingRuleCode: phone_mask
                  maskingPolicy:
                    rules:
                      phone_mask:
                        type: PHONE
                        preservePrefix: 3
                        preserveSuffix: 4
                  dataScopeTemplate: "tenant_id = :tenantId and org_id in (:orgScope)"
                  cursorField: orderId
                  orderBy:
                    - field: orderId
                      direction: ASC
                  batchSize: 1000
      x-contract-errorResponses:
        - QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
        - FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
        - MASKING_RULE_ERROR
        - REGISTRY_CONFLICT
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Registry created.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryBadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryConflict"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryServerError"
    get:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: List export registries
      operationId: listExportRegistries
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - name: taskCode
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: subsystemCode
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: enabled
          in: query
          schema:
            type: boolean
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            default: 1
        - name: pageSize
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            minimum: 1
            maximum: 100
            default: 20
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paged registry list.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryPageEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
  /export/registries/{taskCode}:
    get:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Get export registry
      operationId: getExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskCode"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Registry detail.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
    put:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Update export registry
      description: Registry updates only affect tasks created after the update.
      operationId: updateExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskCode"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryUpsertRequest"
      x-contract-errorResponses:
        - QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
        - FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
        - MASKING_RULE_ERROR
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Registry updated.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryBadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/RegistryServerError"
  /export/registries/{taskCode}/enable:
    post:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Enable export registry
      operationId: enableExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskCode"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Registry enabled.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
  /export/registries/{taskCode}/disable:
    post:
      tags: [ExportRegistries]
      summary: Disable export registry
      operationId: disableExportRegistry
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/TaskCode"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Registry disabled.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotRegistered"
        "500":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InternalError"
components:
  securitySchemes:
    OperatorId:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Operator-Id
      description: Authenticated operator id forwarded by gateway or caller.
    TenantId:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Tenant-Id
      description: Tenant id forwarded by gateway or caller.
    RoleCodes:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Role-Codes
      description: Comma-separated role codes forwarded by gateway or caller.
    OrgScope:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Org-Scope
      description: Organization scope forwarded by gateway or caller.
    RequestId:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Request-Id
      description: Request id used by audit logs and task events.
  parameters:
    XOperatorId:
      name: X-Operator-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Authenticated operator id.
    XTenantId:
      name: X-Tenant-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Tenant id for task visibility and data scope.
    XRoleCodes:
      name: X-Role-Codes
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Comma-separated role codes.
    XOrgScope:
      name: X-Org-Scope
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Organization scope expression or encoded scope list.
    XRequestId:
      name: X-Request-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Upstream request id used by audit logs and task events.
    TaskId:
      name: taskId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
    TaskCode:
      name: taskCode
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
  responses:
    AuthContextMissing:
      description: Required auth context is missing or malformed.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            authMissing:
              value:
                code: AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING
                message: auth context missing
                data: null
    PermissionDenied:
      description: Operator has no permission for the task, registry or file.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            denied:
              value:
                code: PERMISSION_DENIED
                message: permission denied
                data: null
    TaskNotFound:
      description: Task not found or invisible to current operator.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            notFound:
              value:
                code: TASK_NOT_FOUND
                message: task not found
                data: null
    TaskNotRegistered:
      description: taskCode is not registered.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            notRegistered:
              value:
                code: TASK_NOT_REGISTERED
                message: task code not registered
                data: null
    CreateTaskBadRequest:
      description: Create task request is invalid, disabled or exceeds configured limits.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            validation:
              value:
                code: VALIDATION_ERROR
                message: validation failed
                data: null
                errors:
                  - field: taskCode
                    reason: required
            taskDisabled:
              value:
                code: TASK_DISABLED
                message: task code is disabled
                data:
                  taskCode: purchase-order-export
            queryParamsTooLarge:
              value:
                code: QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE
                message: queryParams exceeds 32768 bytes
                data: null
            exportLimitExceeded:
              value:
                code: EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
                message: export limit exceeded
                data:
                  exportMaxRows: 100000
    IdempotencyConflict:
      description: Same idempotency scope with different request digest.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            conflict:
              value:
                code: IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
                message: clientRequestId conflicts with a different request digest
                data:
                  idempotencyScope: tenant-001:u001:purchase-order-export:req-20260513-0001
    InvalidTaskState:
      description: Operation is not allowed for current official task status.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            invalidRetry:
              value:
                code: INVALID_TASK_STATE
                message: current task status does not allow this operation
                data:
                  status: EXECUTING
    ActiveAttemptConflict:
      description: Another active execution attempt already exists.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            activeAttempt:
              value:
                code: ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT
                message: active execution attempt already exists
                data:
                  taskId: exp_20260513_000001
                  attemptNo: 1
    FileExpired:
      description: File is expired or marked as not downloadable.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            expired:
              value:
                code: FILE_EXPIRED
                message: file expired
                data: null
    FileNotReady:
      description: File is not published or the task is not completed yet.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            notReady:
              value:
                code: FILE_NOT_READY
                message: file is not ready for download
                data:
                  status: EXECUTING
    FileVerifyError:
      description: File upload, metadata or checksum verification failed before publish.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            verifyFailed:
              value:
                code: FILE_VERIFY_ERROR
                message: file verification failed
                data:
                  checksumAlgorithm: SHA-256
    DatasourceUnavailable:
      description: Datasource or datasource credential is unavailable.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            datasourceUnavailable:
              value:
                code: DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
                message: datasource unavailable
                data:
                  datasourceCode: purchase_ro
    QueryExecutionError:
      description: Query execution failed, batch retries exhausted or cursor contract violated.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            queryFailed:
              value:
                code: QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR
                message: query execution failed
                data:
                  cursorField: orderId
    RegistryBadRequest:
      description: Registry request is invalid, exceeds limits, or contains invalid field/masking configuration.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            validation:
              value:
                code: VALIDATION_ERROR
                message: validation failed
                data: null
            exportLimitExceeded:
              value:
                code: EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
                message: export limit exceeded
                data:
                  exportMaxRows: 100000
            fieldMappingInvalid:
              value:
                code: FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
                message: field mapping invalid
                data:
                  fieldCode: contactPhone
            maskingRuleError:
              value:
                code: MASKING_RULE_ERROR
                message: masking rule error
                data:
                  maskingRuleCode: phone_mask
    RegistryServerError:
      description: Registry contract references an invalid query template, datasource, field mapping or masking backend.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            queryTemplateInvalid:
              value:
                code: QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
                message: query template invalid
                data:
                  taskCode: purchase-order-export
            datasourceUnavailable:
              value:
                code: DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
                message: datasource unavailable
                data:
                  datasourceCode: purchase_ro
            fieldMappingInvalid:
              value:
                code: FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
                message: field mapping invalid
                data:
                  fieldCode: contactPhone
            maskingRuleError:
              value:
                code: MASKING_RULE_ERROR
                message: masking rule error
                data:
                  maskingRuleCode: phone_mask
    ExportRenderError:
      description: XLSX or ZIP render failed.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            renderFailed:
              value:
                code: EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR
                message: export render error
                data:
                  fileFormat: ZIP
    RegistryConflict:
      description: Registry taskCode already exists or conflicts with immutable fields.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            duplicate:
              value:
                code: REGISTRY_CONFLICT
                message: taskCode already exists
                data: null
    InternalError:
      description: Unclassified server-side error. Specific platform errors should use a more precise response when known.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            internalError:
              value:
                code: INTERNAL_ERROR
                message: internal error
                data: null
  schemas:
    ResponseCode:
      type: string
      enum:
        - SUCCESS
        - VALIDATION_ERROR
        - AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING
        - PERMISSION_DENIED
        - TASK_NOT_FOUND
        - TASK_NOT_REGISTERED
        - TASK_DISABLED
        - QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE
        - IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
        - INVALID_TASK_STATE
        - FILE_EXPIRED
        - FILE_NOT_READY
        - FILE_VERIFY_ERROR
        - FILE_CLEANUP_DELETE_ERROR
        - QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
        - DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
        - QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR
        - FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
        - MASKING_RULE_ERROR
        - EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR
        - EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
        - REGISTRY_CONFLICT
        - ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
    TaskStatus:
      type: string
      description: Official public task status. Internal cancel flags are not valid values.
      enum: [PENDING, EXECUTING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELED, EXPIRED]
    FileFormat:
      type: string
      enum: [XLSX, ZIP]
    DeliveryMode:
      type: string
      enum: [SIGNED_URL, STREAM]
    Envelope:
      type: object
      required: [code, message]
      properties:
        code:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResponseCode"
        message:
          type: string
    ErrorEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          properties:
            data:
              type: object
              nullable: true
              additionalProperties: true
            errors:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FieldError"
    FieldError:
      type: object
      required: [field, reason]
      properties:
        field:
          type: string
        reason:
          type: string
    CreateExportTaskRequest:
      type: object
      required: [taskCode, subsystemCode, fileFormat, queryParams]
      properties:
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        fileFormat:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileFormat"
        clientRequestId:
          type: string
          maxLength: 128
          description: Optional idempotency key scoped by tenantId/operatorId/taskCode.
        queryParams:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
          description: Must match registry parameter schema and must not exceed 32768 bytes after canonical JSON serialization.
        deliveryPreference:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeliveryMode"
    CreateExportTaskResponseEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateExportTaskResponse"
    CreateExportTaskResponse:
      type: object
      required:
        - taskId
        - taskCode
        - subsystemCode
        - status
        - idempotencyScope
        - requestDigest
        - configSnapshotDigest
        - attemptNo
        - createdAt
      properties:
        taskId:
          type: string
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [PENDING]
        clientRequestId:
          type: string
        idempotencyHit:
          type: boolean
        idempotencyScope:
          type: string
          description: Stable success-response evidence for the tenantId + operatorId + taskCode + clientRequestId idempotency scope.
        requestDigest:
          type: string
        configSnapshotDigest:
          type: string
        attemptNo:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    ExportTaskDetailEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskDetail"
    ExportTaskDetail:
      type: object
      required:
        - taskId
        - taskCode
        - subsystemCode
        - status
        - totalCount
        - processedCount
        - progressPercent
        - attemptNo
        - requestId
        - requestDigest
        - configSnapshotDigest
        - createdBy
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt
      properties:
        taskId:
          type: string
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskStatus"
        totalCount:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          minimum: 0
        processedCount:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          minimum: 0
        progressPercent:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
        fileFormat:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileFormat"
        attemptNo:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        errorCode:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResponseCode"
        errorMessage:
          type: string
        failureStage:
          type: string
        lastSuccessStage:
          type: string
        requestId:
          type: string
        requestDigest:
          type: string
        configSnapshotDigest:
          type: string
        createdBy:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        file:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileMetadata"
        batchCheckpoint:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/BatchCheckpoint"
        recentEvents:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskEvent"
        auditEvents:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AuditEvent"
    ExportTaskPageEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskPage"
    ExportTaskPage:
      type: object
      required: [items, page, pageSize, total]
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskDetail"
        page:
          type: integer
        pageSize:
          type: integer
        total:
          type: integer
          format: int64
    DownloadResponseEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DownloadResponse"
    DownloadResponse:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileMetadata"
        - type: object
          required: [deliveryMode, expiresAt]
          properties:
            deliveryMode:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeliveryMode"
            downloadUrl:
              type: string
              format: uri
            expiresAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
    FileMetadata:
      type: object
      required:
        - fileName
        - fileSize
        - contentType
        - checksum
        - checksumAlgorithm
        - storageKey
        - expiresAt
        - attemptNo
      properties:
        fileName:
          type: string
        fileSize:
          type: integer
          format: int64
        contentType:
          type: string
        tempStorageKey:
          type: string
        publishedStorageKey:
          type: string
        storageKey:
          type: string
        expiresAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          description: Published file retention expiry time. Signed URL responses also use expiresAt for URL expiry.
        checksum:
          type: string
        checksumAlgorithm:
          type: string
          enum: [SHA-256]
        checksumVerifiedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        publishedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        deliveryReadyAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        attemptNo:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
    TaskActionRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        reason:
          type: string
          maxLength: 500
    TaskActionResponseEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskActionResponse"
    TaskActionResponse:
      type: object
      required: [taskId, status, attemptNo, acceptedAt]
      properties:
        taskId:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskStatus"
        attemptNo:
          type: integer
        cancelAccepted:
          type: boolean
          description: True means an EXECUTING task will stop at a batch boundary; this is not a task status.
        retryAccepted:
          type: boolean
        configSnapshotDigest:
          type: string
        acceptedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    ExportRegistryUpsertRequest:

## Summary

本轮复审结论为 `PASS_WITH_GAPS`。

原先六个 RCR findings 中，除 `CLEANUP-AUDIT-ERROR-CODE-001` 外，其余主漂移均已通过修复证据关闭：

- 审计 action/result 主漂移已修：`src/task-api/service.ts`、`src/registry-config/service.ts` 使用 `FAILED`，registry 查询使用 `REGISTRY_QUERY`；cleanup action 使用 `EXPIRE_MARK` / `CLEANUP_FAILED`。
- 管理员历史全局查询已修：`src/task-api/service.ts:385-400` 管理员 list 不传 `tenantId`；`tests/api/export-http-api.test.mjs:419-443` 断言跨租户管理员 list 可见、detail 仍 403。
- 配置快照回放已修：`src/task-api/service.ts:320-356` 创建任务持久化完整 `configSnapshot`；`src/query-executor/index.ts:222-233` 优先使用 task requestPayload 中 snapshot；`tests/query/query-executor.test.mjs:406-476`、`tests/worker/scheduler-worker.test.mjs:515-600` 覆盖 registry 更新/禁用后旧任务仍按创建时快照执行。
- 查询批次 retry 已修：`src/scheduler/worker.ts:428-455` 写入 `retryCount` / `backoffMs` 并续租；`src/scheduler/worker.ts:773-777` 将 `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR` / `DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE` 作为可重试批次错误；`tests/worker/scheduler-worker.test.mjs:750-790`、`:816-855`、`:982-1040` 覆盖短暂失败、backoff 和耗尽。
- 数据源不可用已修：`src/query-executor/index.ts:780-795` 映射连接/凭证类错误为 `DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE`；`tests/query/query-executor.test.mjs:731-740` 和 `tests/worker/scheduler-worker.test.mjs:1044-1075` 覆盖 query/worker 收口。
- 文件 put/publish 失败映射已修：`src/file-service/index.ts:78-105` 和 `:412-420` 将 put/read/publish 映射为 `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR`；`tests/file/export-file-service.test.mjs:510-558`、`:611-655` 覆盖不发布 metadata 与 worker audit `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR`。

仍有一个 P1 gap：

- `CLEANUP-AUDIT-ERROR-CODE-001`
- cleanup 失败审计写入 `FILE_CLEANUP_DELETE_ERROR`，但 `contracts/openapi.yaml` 的 `ResponseCode` enum 不包含该值，而 `AuditEvent.errorCode` 引用的是 `ResponseCode`。
- 当前测试只断言 `CLEANUP_FAILED` + `FAILED`，未断言 cleanup audit errorCode 落在公开契约枚举内。
- 这会让 FR-010 / FR-011、AC-010 / AC-011 的审计契约边界仍存在 P1 缺口，因此 release gate 不应声明 cleanup 失败路径完全契约一致。

**Feature ID**: `FEAT-REQUIREMENTS-COMPLETE-REVIEW-001`
**建议 Task ID**: `REQUIREMENTS-COMPLETE-REVIEW-001`

## 1. 需求分析

用户当前要求不是继续补单点功能，而是：

- 先从 `docs/product/*` 重新理解真实需求。
- 用需求逐条审查当前实现是否完整覆盖。
- 审查范围必须覆盖产品、架构、OpenAPI、服务实现、DB、worker、query、file、sample、测试和 evidence 边界。
- 如发现缺口，应形成新的任务或后续修复队列，而不是直接修改已有完成任务的历史结论。

本 review 必须以这些文件为准：

| 维度 | 重点问题 | 输出 |
| --- | --- | --- |

| API 契约 | OpenAPI operation、错误码、状态、响应字段是否与 PRD/AC 一致 | contract findings |
| 状态机 | PENDING/EXECUTING/COMPLETED/FAILED/CANCELED/EXPIRED 与内部 cancel flag 是否无外泄 | state findings |
| DB/worker | MySQL schema、锁租约、接管、重试、checkpoint 是否符合需求 | persistence findings |
| query/file/sample | 查询模板、脱敏、分片、ZIP、10 万行、文件校验和下载保护是否闭环 | domain findings |
| 证据边界 | mock/local/docker/live 是否清晰，不互相替代 | evidence findings |
| 测试实践 | package script、task test_command、verify-matrix、守护测试是否一致 | test governance findings |

## 4. 产物

建议产物：

- `docs/reviews/requirements-complete-review.md`
- `docs/reviews/requirements-complete-review.findings.json`

- P0/P1 缺口清单，带文件路径和建议 task id

- 如果发现 P0 缺口，review 任务可以完成，但总体结论必须是 `PASS_WITH_GAPS` 或 `FAIL`，并创建后续修复建议。

# Harness 从执行闭环扩展为知识闭环

## Context

当前 harness 已经能通过 `task.json`、`codex-loop.ps1`、验证命令、Stage 1/2 review、trace 和 commit gate 建立执行闭环，但缺少知识复用与归档机制。

## Decision

将 `docs/knowledge/` 作为项目级知识层，并在 trace、任务模板和归档阶段中显式记录知识引用与知识产出。

## Consequences

正面影响：

- 后续任务可以复用已验证经验，减少重复推导。
- review finding 和失败经验能沉淀为可检索资产。
- 规则升级可以基于 proven 知识，而不是单次偏好。

代价：

- 需要维护 catalog 和条目成熟度。
- 需要在归档阶段控制噪音，避免把一次性结论误升为规则。

# 规则必须短入口、深文档、可验证

## Context

根规则过长会消耗指令预算，孤立深文档又容易不被发现。当前仓库已经有 `AGENTS.md`、`docs/harness/*`、`.agents/rules/*` 和 `.codex/prompts/*` 多层规则面，需要明确分层。

## Guidance

- `AGENTS.md` 只保留每次会话必须遵守的硬约束和深文档索引。
- 复杂流程写入 `docs/harness/*` 或 `.agents/rules/*`。
- 执行时必须注入的行为写入 `.codex/prompts/*`。
- 禁令必须包含替代方案。
- 能自动检查的规则应进入脚本、schema 或 hook，而不是只靠文字约束。

import type { FastifyInstance, FastifyReply } from "fastify";
import { sendJson } from "../http/types.ts";
import { OPENAPI_OPERATION_ROUTES, type OperationRoute } from "./route-manifest.ts";

type RouteMatch = {
  route: OperationRoute;
  params: Record<string, string>;
};

function matchPath(pattern: string, actualPath: string): Record<string, string> | undefined {
  const patternSegments = pattern.split("/").filter(Boolean);
  const actualSegments = actualPath.split("/").filter(Boolean);

  if (patternSegments.length !== actualSegments.length) {
    return undefined;
  }

  const params: Record<string, string> = {};
  for (let index = 0; index < patternSegments.length; index += 1) {
    const patternSegment = patternSegments[index];
    const actualSegment = actualSegments[index];
    const paramMatch = patternSegment.match(/^\{([^}]+)\}$/);

    if (paramMatch) {
      params[paramMatch[1]] = decodeURIComponent(actualSegment);
      continue;
    }

    if (patternSegment !== actualSegment) {
      return undefined;
    }
  }

  return params;
}

function findRoute(method: string, pathname: string): RouteMatch | undefined {
  for (const route of OPENAPI_OPERATION_ROUTES) {
    if (route.method !== method) {
      continue;
    }

    const params = matchPath(route.path, pathname);
    if (params) {
      return { route, params };
    }
  }

  return undefined;
}

export async function handleApiRoute(
  method: string,
  pathname: string,
  response: FastifyReply
): Promise<boolean> {
  const routeMatch = findRoute(method, pathname);

  if (!routeMatch) {
    return false;
  }

  routeMatch.route.handler(
    { params: routeMatch.params, request: response.request },
    response
  );
  return true;
}

export function sendNotFound(response: FastifyReply): void {
  sendJson(response, 404, {
    code: "TASK_NOT_FOUND",
    message: "route not found",
    data: null
  });
}

export function registerRoutes(app: FastifyInstance): void {
  for (const route of OPENAPI_OPERATION_ROUTES) {
    const fastifyPath = route.path.replace(/\{([^}]+)\}/g, ":$1");
    app.route({
      method: route.method,
      url: fastifyPath,
      handler: async (request, response) => {
        await route.handler({ params: request.params as Record<string, string>, request }, response);
      }
    });
  }
}

import Fastify, { type FastifyInstance } from "fastify";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
import { loadConfig, type ExportPlatformConfig } from "./config/env.ts";
import { registerRoutes } from "./routes/register-routes.ts";

export function createExportPlatformServer(
  config: ExportPlatformConfig = loadConfig()
): FastifyInstance {
  const app = Fastify({
    logger: false
  });

  app.addContentTypeParser(
    "application/json",
    { parseAs: "string" },
    (_request, body, done) => {
      const text = typeof body === "string" ? body : body.toString("utf8");
      if (text.trim().length === 0) {
        done(null, {});
        return;
      }

      try {
        done(null, JSON.parse(text));
      } catch (error) {
        done(error as Error, undefined);
      }
    }
  );

  app.get("/health", async () => ({
    status: "ok",
    service: config.serviceName,
    deliveryShape: config.deliveryShape,
    entries: {
      http: true,
      worker: true,
      cleanupJob: true
    }
  }));

  registerRoutes(app);

  app.setNotFoundHandler(async (_request, response) => {
    response.code(404).send({
      code: "TASK_NOT_FOUND",
      message: "route not found",
      data: null
    });
  });

  return app;
}

export async function startServer(
  config: ExportPlatformConfig = loadConfig()
): Promise<FastifyInstance> {
  const server = createExportPlatformServer(config);
  await server.listen({ port: config.port, host: config.host });
  console.log(
    JSON.stringify({
      event: "export-platform.http.started",
      host: config.host,
      port: config.port
    })
  );
  return server;
}

if (process.argv[1] === fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)) {
  startServer().catch((error) => {
    console.error(error);
    process.exit(1);
  });
}
